Name: Well Clinic SF
Tagline: Online Therapy in San Francisco - Experience our "therapist matchmaker" service - get paired with the best clinician for your specific needs. FREE CONSULT.
About: With the guidance of external consultation, we are committed to addressing the manifestations of white supremicist culture at the clinic as well as providing financial support to anti-racism activists. Our goal is to build structure into the company that will outlive the fervor of this moment and create meaningful change while also using our position in the community to help others do the same.
Philosophy: We feel deep sorrow, regret, and humility in waking up to this and acknowledging it. We probably can not fully understand the harm that we have caused as a result, but we are engaged in learning and bring as much consciousness as we can to this ongoing process of advocating for BIPOC by committing to and being vocal about anti-racism.
Outcomes: Clients at Well Clinic SF often report improved mental health and personal growth. Many clients experience enhanced relationships and increased resilience through personalized therapy and wellness programs.
Admissions: To apply for services at Well Clinic SF, prospective clients can schedule a free consultation through their website. The clinic offers a 'therapist matchmaker' service to pair clients with the best clinician for their needs.
Quote: Empower healing and transformation through sustained commitment to diversity, equity, and support for anti-racism efforts.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Well Clinic partners with companies in our community to enrich the well being of their staff.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: These are among the basic and universal struggles facing us all right now. Mastering skills to help with perspective, understanding your stress response, and nervous system regulation, will help build a resiliency toolkit for your staff members and manage anxiety symptoms.
Performance.Academic Integration: Well Clinic SF offers personalized therapy sessions focusing on cognitive-behavioral techniques and mindfulness practices. Clinicians are highly qualified, holding advanced degrees in psychology and counseling.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Clients often achieve significant personal growth, leading to improved career prospects and enhanced professional relationships. Many report increased workplace resilience and leadership skills through tailored therapeutic interventions.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The clinic features serene therapy rooms designed for comfort and privacy, fostering a conducive environment for mental health treatment. Additionally, clients have access to a resource library with wellness literature.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Well Clinic SF employs a robust feedback system, offering regular progress updates through personalized client reports. Clinicians maintain open communication channels to ensure continuous client engagement and satisfaction.
